rows.label: qev025302_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, my, my! Have you come all
this way for me, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0002
rows.name: Did you bring the Noka mirrorstone, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0003
rows.name:
If you haven't yet, you should hurry
up and bring it, shouldn't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh, my, my! Have you come all
this way for me, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0005
rows.name: Did you bring the Noka mirrorstone, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hmmm... The quality
isn't very good, is it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0007
rows.name:
But well, for an Earth-made Doll,
this is more than enough, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0008
rows.name:
Just wait right here, okay! I'll
refine this into some absolutely
phenomenal materials right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's done, see! Accept it
with gratitude, won't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0010
rows.name:
Were you surprised by how fast it
was? Were you surprised by the
technological prowess of the Ma-non?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0011
rows.name:
Of course you were, it's quite
something, isn't it! Ma-non technology
is the best in the universe, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0012
rows.name:
Not only will this fix the Doll
perfectly, it will surely improve its
defensive capabilities too, won't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0013
rows.name:
Now hurry up and take this to the
Earthling waiting at the test site, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0014
rows.name:
Not only will this fix the Doll
perfectly, it will surely improve its
defensive capabilities too, won't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0015
rows.name:
Now hurry up and take this to the
Earthling waiting at the test site, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0016
rows.name:
Oh, oh, oh, oh! Do you still have
some business with me, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0017
rows.name:
What a shame, I have no more
business with you, do I. I would
kindly ask you to leave, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0018
rows.name:
A new negotiation...? Hmm, does that mean
you are prepared to offer me some information
or goods that would benefit me, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_JNK0010
rows.name: Offer Information

rows.label: qev025302_SEL0011
rows.name: Offer to teach Earth technology.

rows.label: qev025302_JNK0020
rows.name: Offer Money

rows.label: qev025302_SEL0021
rows.name: Pay with currency.

rows.label: qev025302_JNK0030
rows.name: Offer Goods

rows.label: qev025302_SEL0031
rows.name: Hand over a specialty product from Earth.

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0019
rows.name: Earth technology...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0020
rows.name:
Do you people make a habit of learning
new science and technology from ancients
many generations behind you, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0021
rows.name:
There is simply nothing we could possibly
learn from Earthlings now, is there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0022
rows.name: I would kindly ask you to leave, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0023
rows.name:
I see, the exchange of money is the basis of
an economy, isn't it. You could say it's the
most suitable method for acquiring technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0024
rows.name:
However, we Ma-non can live perfectly
fine just within this ship, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0025
rows.name:
There is almost no need for us to go out of
our way to use Earth currency and participate
in economic activities with you, is there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0026
rows.name:
Therefore, negotiations have
broken down, haven't they.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0027
rows.name:
O-o-o-oh! I am quite interested in
specialty products from Earth, aren't I![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0028
rows.name:
What kind of thing will
you offer me, I wonder?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_JNK0040
rows.name: Furniture

rows.label: qev025302_SEL0041
rows.name: Hand over luxurious goods.

rows.label: qev025302_JNK0050
rows.name: Toys

rows.label: qev025302_SEL0051
rows.name: Show your prized collection.

rows.label: qev025302_JNK0060
rows.name: Food

rows.label: qev025302_SEL0061
rows.name: Hand over whatever food comes to mind.

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0029
rows.name:
What is this, exactly?
Is it junk, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0030
rows.name:
It's quite rude of you to try
and gloss things over with
something like this, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0031
rows.name: I would kindly ask you to leave, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0032
rows.name:
This is...! The data for some
incredibly cool figures, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0033
rows.name:
Holo-figures, you call them?
You can decorate your home with
them and admire them, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0034
rows.name:
But I'm terribly sorry, my wife
has actually forbidden me from
pursuing this hobby, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0035
rows.name:
Being an obsessive person by nature, I
once put a severe strain on our household
finances collecting figures, right...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0036
rows.name:
It pains me to death to say it,
but this deal is off, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0037
rows.name: I would kindly ask you to leave, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0038
rows.name: Mmm, food, is it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0039
rows.name:
It's true that when it comes to food
alone, Earthlings have a surprisingly
remarkable culture, don't they.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0040
rows.name:
However, even if you don't hand it over
to me right here and now, I could just
go eat in the city later, couldn't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0041
rows.name:
But if you insist that much, I
wouldn't mind trying something that
is a unique specialty of NLA, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0071
rows.name:
I heard from Matthew earlier,
this city used to be in a place
called America, didn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0074
rows.name:
I wouldn't mind trying something
that is a unique specialty of
that specific place, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0075
rows.name:
Now then, if you want me to teach
you the prized Ma-non technology,
hurry up and fetch it, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0076
rows.name:
Oh, you brought a specialty
product, did you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0077
rows.name:
Well then, hand over your
recommendation, please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0079
rows.name: What is this...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0080
rows.name:
Is this a Hamburger, perhaps?
There's all sorts of food
sandwiched between the bread...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0081
rows.name:
It has quite an interesting
shape, doesn't it. Well then,
I'll try eating it right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0082
rows.name:
*Munch munch munch*...
*Munch munch munch*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0083
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0084
rows.name:
...Hmmm? It looks interesting,
but it lacks a bit of a punch.
I'm returning this to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0085
rows.name:
If it's not a specialty product with
more of an impact, I can't teach you
the refining technology, can I~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0086
rows.name: What is this...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0087
rows.name:
Is this a Hotdog, perhaps?
There's a long piece of meat
sandwiched between the bread...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0088
rows.name:
It's quite an exciting food, isn't it!
Well then, I'll try eating it right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0089
rows.name:
*Munch munch munch*...
*Munch munch munch*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0090
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0091
rows.name:
...Hot! The meat inside is way
too hot, it's burning me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0092
rows.name:
Even though it's a Hotdog, it's far
too hot, isn't it! It's dangerous,
so I'm returning this to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0093
rows.name:
If it's not a slightly more safety-conscious
specialty product, I can't teach you
the refining technology, can I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0042
rows.name: What is this...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0043
rows.name:
O-Ooh, is this Pizza, perhaps?!
It's nice and cold, it looks
absolutely delicious, doesn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0044
rows.name: I'll partake immediately, yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0045
rows.name:
*Munch munch munch*... *Munch
munch munch*... ...Mmmmm?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0046
rows.name: This is...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0047
rows.name:
Super! Absolute! Deliciousness!
I've never eaten anything so
tasty before, have I![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0048
rows.name:
It's a little dry, maybe... but the rock-hard
cheese and the crunchy bell peppers! And the
absolute best part is the icy-crisp ketchup![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0049
rows.name:
...Eh? You're actually supposed to
heat this up before eating it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0050
rows.name:
That doesn't matter, does it! This food
undoubtedly possesses value equal to the
hidden treasures of the galaxy, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0051
rows.name:
Even the Mad King of myth who destroyed
a planet would throw everything away and
prostrate himself before this flavor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0052
rows.name:
I'm so glad I was born, aren't I!
Thank you, Mother and Father![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0053
rows.name: ...Hm? A negotiation?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0054
rows.name:
Oh, regarding the material refining recipe, was it!
Compared to the potential of this Pizza, that old thing
is worse than the radish garnish on sashimi, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0055
rows.name:
Though I've never actually eaten
a radish garnish either, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0056
rows.name:
Regardless, the negotiation is a massive success, isn't it! In fact, are
you sure you're fine with such an unequal trade? This is compensation
for a power that could control even the Mad King of myth, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0057
rows.name:
Is that so? If you're fine with it,
then I have no objections, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0058
rows.name:
Ah, but teaching the refining technology
itself is quite complicated, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0059
rows.name:
How about I take responsibility
and handle the refining process
for you from now on, hmm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0060
rows.name:
You'll still be getting the materials
themselves, so there's no problem,
right? It's not a bad deal, is it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev025302_SEL0071
rows.name: Accept the deal.

rows.label: qev025302_JNK0080
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev025302_SEL0081
rows.name: Do not accept the deal.

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0061
rows.name:
Oh! It's so helpful that you're
so understanding, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0062
rows.name:
Then regarding the materials from now
on, we Ma-non promise to supply them
to you on a regular basis, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0063
rows.name: That resolves the issue, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0064
rows.name:
Hmmm. I can understand your desire
to create everything with your own
hands from start to finish, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0065
rows.name:
From the perspective of work efficiency,
I highly recommend entrusting the
refining process to us Ma-non, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0066
rows.name:
You could call this the first step toward
peaceful coexistence, couldn't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0067
rows.name: You understand, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0068
rows.name:
Okay! The problem is solved peacefully
with mutual consent, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0069
rows.name:
Man, this feels great, doesn't it!
Both our cultures have taken another
step forward, haven't they![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025302_MSG0070
rows.name:
We'll continue to maintain a
wonderful relationship with you
people moving forward, okay![ST:wait ]
